calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maureen McFadden appearing via zoom for Norma Randig (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 14, 2011 is admitted to probate. Norma Randig is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported
